rationale: C19 next_cycle_plan: bug hunt C19 + JourneyMapDisplay visual polish. Bug hunt verified 4 files (GFC, EndRunScreen, BroceliandeForest3D, .tscn) — 0 bugs in C19 code. Found BUG-031 MEDIUM: story_log never passed from BroceliandeForest3D encounters to EndRunScreen. The data pipeline had a gap: _build_run_summary() omitted story_log key, and encounter cards never tracked entries. Fixed both: _encounter_story_log tracks card title/choice/score per encounter, passed to GFC. Feature: JourneyMapDisplay rewritten with CRT visual treatment — glow rings, dashed lines, progressive reveal, score badges, pulse animation.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C20 (verify story_log data flows correctly: BroceliandeForest3D → GFC._build_end_run_data() → EndRunScreen.show_results() → JourneyMapDisplay.setup()). Then feature: MinigameResultOverlay — visual overlay shown after minigame completion with score animation, field hint, and effect preview before applying to run state.
